subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablí-Husayn! The Wronged One maketh mention of thee from the precincts of the Prison, and summoneth thee unto God, the Lord of all worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل حسین یذکرک المظلوم من شطر السجن و یدعوک الی الله رب العالمین
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @human reality created in the image of God, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @chastisement and requital
